A.A:
100+ posts created
30+ designs/templates
10+ clients and collabs
 50+ hours spent creating


These numbers are not just stats. They are proof that I showed up, kept learning, and kept creating even when it felt hard.

This year I:

 • Spoke at Larana Conference
 • Reached 10K followers

I used to only dream of moments like this. Now they are part of my story. Small, consistent steps made this possible.

Client: Salford & Co. Flowers
Project: Content Creation

This project reminded me why I love creating. I enjoy helping people share their story through clear, thoughtful design and content.
